notes: Research-backed image recipe: ubuntu:22.04 + apt-install ros-humble-ros-base + symlink python + pip constraint numpy>=1.24,<2.0. numpy 1.26 is ABI-forward-compatible with rclpy's compiled-against-1.21 extension (1.x compat). DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive + pre-linked localtime stops tzdata prompt during apt install. Env vars baked via .env() so no setup.bash sourcing needed.
